# Mystická Hvězda (mystickahvezda.cz)
A premium Czech platform for astrology, tarot, and AI-driven esoteric insights.

## Description
Mystická Hvězda provides professional tools for self-discovery, spiritual growth, and future forecasting using a blend of ancient wisdom (astrology, runes, tarot) and modern AI interpretation.

## Key Services
- **Tarot Online:** AI-augmented tarot readings. [tarot.html](https://www.mystickahvezda.cz/tarot.html)
- **Horoscopes:** Daily, weekly, and monthly zodiac forecasts. [horoskopy.html](https://www.mystickahvezda.cz/horoskopy.html)
- **Numerology:** Detailed path of life and soul calculations. [numerologie.html](https://www.mystickahvezda.cz/numerologie.html)
- **AI Oracle:** Real-time answers from a mystical crystal ball. [kristalova-koule.html](https://www.mystickahvezda.cz/kristalova-koule.html)
- **Astrocartography:** Planetary lines and strength places mapping. [astro-mapa.html](https://www.mystickahvezda.cz/astro-mapa.html)
- **Names Database:** Esoteric meanings, origin, and numerology for 280+ Czech names, each with its own page. [jmena/](https://www.mystickahvezda.cz/jmena/)
- **Dream Dictionary:** 164 dream symbols with interpretations and reflection prompts. [snar.html](https://www.mystickahvezda.cz/snar.html)
- **Life-Path Numbers:** Meanings for numerology numbers 1-9 and master numbers 11, 22, 33. [numerologie/zivotni-cislo-1.html](https://www.mystickahvezda.cz/numerologie/zivotni-cislo-1.html)
- **Angel Card Meanings:** 44 angel cards with messages and daily practices. [andelske-karty.html](https://www.mystickahvezda.cz/andelske-karty.html)
- **Tarot Card Meanings:** All 78 tarot cards explained. [tarot-vyznam-karet.html](https://www.mystickahvezda.cz/tarot-vyznam-karet.html)
- **Zodiac Compatibility:** All 78 sign pair combinations. [partnerska-shoda.html](https://www.mystickahvezda.cz/partnerska-shoda.html)

## Full Documentation
For a deep dive into our methodology and extended context, visit [llms-full.txt](https://www.mystickahvezda.cz/llms-full.txt)
